resources.string: This will erase all saved data and notes from Slot 1 to 5. This action cannot be undone
Info Logger is a simple app designed to help users save and remember important details about people they meet.
- Enter a name, phone number, and short description.
- Select one of the 5 storage slots.
- Use Save to save the information written.
- Use View to check the saved information.
- Use Delete to remove one slot or clear all saved data.
InfoLogger was created for users who forget names, phone numbers, or useful details after meeting someone. It provides a quick and simple memory aid for everyday use.
